title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Kaido, Big Mom as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, to change scenery rather suddenly. In truth, there are two

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One is to take the all-or-nothing gamble and hope the Koi can pull you up the waterfall.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other is to split it and pass through a long underground cavern.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, without Kaido and Croch's permission. You'd never make it to the end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From there, crewmembers and cargo can be lifted by gondola to the surface of wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The tunnel that leads to the surface

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: came back just for the banquet, too?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Golden Kaguira only happens once a year!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't tryna have a falling out with anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This year things'll be even crazier than usual.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It seems the numbers have returned.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're the worst sort of drunks! I hate 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The night of the fire festival will have a splendid banquet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The heck is this?! How did y'all go from being at each other's throats to being best buds?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: We of the hundred beast pirates

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Hereby enter into a pirate alliance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll cooperate and take over the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We can always kill each other after!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
